# Cherax Wiki

> A fan-made, community-driven collection of tutorials and guides for the Cherax GTA mod menu. This site is unofficial and not affiliated with the Cherax developers.

Cherax Wiki documents how to purchase, set up, customize, and troubleshoot the Cherax mod menu for GTA Online, including Lua scripting, recoveries, and reseller safety.

## Purchasing
- [Purchasing Cherax](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/purchasing-cherax/): How to buy from resellers, save money, and avoid common pitfalls.
- [Reselling Cherax](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/reselling-cherax/): Guidance on reselling Cherax safely and legitimately.
- [Getting Started](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/getting-started/): Setting up the menu and preventing common errors.
- [Full Channel Access](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/getting-access-to-channels/): Unlocking full chat access in the Cherax Discord.
- [Cherax Prime](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/prime/): Overview of the Cherax Prime tier.
- [Advertising](https://cherax.wiki/purchasing/advertising/): Getting players into your session, port forwarding, and NAT spoofing.

## Customization
- [Outfits](https://cherax.wiki/customization/outfits/): Downloading and loading custom outfits.
- [Modded Vehicles](https://cherax.wiki/customization/vehicles/): Downloading and loading modded vehicles.
- [Menu Themes](https://cherax.wiki/customization/themes/): Applying and persisting menu themes.
- [DLCs](https://cherax.wiki/customization/dlcs/): Using DLC vehicles and peds in-game.
- [Luas](https://cherax.wiki/customization/luas/): Running and configuring community Lua scripts (Silent Night, Codax, Bunnyscript, Jinxscript).

## Guides
- [Writing Lua Scripts](https://cherax.wiki/guides/creating-luas/): Introduction to writing Cherax Lua scripts.
- [Using Cherax on Linux](https://cherax.wiki/guides/using-cherax-on-linux/): Running Cherax under Linux/Proton.

## Recovery
- [Recoveries](https://cherax.wiki/recovery/recoveries/): Overview of recovery features and staying safe.
- [Recovery Services](https://cherax.wiki/recovery/recovery-services/): Notes on third-party recovery services.

## Contributing
- [Contributions](https://cherax.wiki/contributing/contributions/): How to request or add content to the wiki.
- [Donations](https://cherax.wiki/contributing/donations/): Supporting the upkeep of the wiki.
